Anna.primary_clothing: light-blue dress with a veiled hat featuring a powder blue ribbon
Anna.face_description: beautiful pair of eyes hidden with sorrow; frequently bites her lower lip in anxiety
Anna.visual_anchor: melancholic young woman with sorrowful eyes, wearing a light-blue Victorian dress and a veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon
Anna.color_palette: light blue, powder blue, pale ivory, soft brown
Anna.accessories: hat with a light blue ribbon
Anna.source_notes: Text describes her hat and eyes during the consultation.
Anna.era_clothing_lock: light-blue Victorian day dress, matching veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon, silk gloves

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: exquisite-looking silver chain with a chunk of pure topaz (spirit pendulum) kept in the left sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Performed his first professional divination using multiple techniques.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Joyce Meyer.face_description: Prominent aquiline (hooked) nose, sharp jawline, and deep-set eyes that appear weary but joyful.
Joyce Meyer.visual_anchor: Mid-20s male with a sharp aquiline nose and short blond hair, wearing a black Victorian formal wool suit and a weary, haggard expression.
Joyce Meyer.color_palette: pitch black, golden blond, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Joyce Meyer.distinguishing_features: haggard appearance from a traumatic journey, joyful glint in eyes
Joyce Meyer.source_notes: Anna's fiancé, born Sep 15, 1323 (currently 25-26). Physical details explicitly stated.
Joyce Meyer.unique_identifier: sharp aquiline nose and short blond hair, often appearing haggard and weary
Joyce Meyer.era_clothing_lock: black wool Victorian formal suit, starched white shirt with a high wing collar, dark silk cravat, and polished black leather boots

Angelica.hair_style: long hair coiled in a mature, elegant style
Angelica.visual_anchor: mature and elegant woman with brownish-yellow long hair coiled, wearing a Victorian attendant's outfit
Angelica.distinguishing_features: carries deep-seated 'rich darkness' (sorrows and pains) hidden in her heart, visible via Spirit Vision
Angelica.role: Receptionist and staff member of the Tingen Divination Club
Angelica.source_notes: Chapter 54 confirms her role and Klein's Spirit Vision observation of her emotional state.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Identifies himself as a 'Mystery Pryer' and mentions the trait of temperance for the sequence.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers
